Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( @IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState = 1 OR @IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState IS NULL OR ISNULL(@ID, 0) != 0 ,1,0)

SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRelease AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRelease AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

DataSource.SQL: UPDATE usr.ITSMApproval SET IsApproved = @ApprovedState , ApproveDateTime = GETDATE() , ApprovedAccountID = @UserID , ApproveComment = @DialogCommunication WHERE TableID = @ID AND FormIdent = @FormIdent AND ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND ApproveOrder = ( SELECT MIN(sub.ApproveOrder) FROM usr.ITSMApproval sub WHERE sub.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND sub.TableID = @ID AND sub.ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND sub.State != 0 AND sub.IsApproved IS NULL ) AND IsApproved IS NULL AND State != 0

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMApproval WHERE TableID = @ID AND FormIdent = @FormIdent AND ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND IsApproved IS NULL AND State != 0 ) ,1,0 )

DataSource.SQL: UPDATE usr.ITSMRelease SET ActualApproveRoundGuid = NEWID() WHERE ID = @ID

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRelease AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

DataSource.SQL: UPDATE usr.ITSMApproval SET IsApproved = @ApprovedState , ApproveDateTime = GETDATE() , ApprovedAccountID = @UserID , ApproveComment = @DialogCommunication WHERE TableID = @ID AND FormIdent = @FormIdent AND ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND ApproveOrder = ( SELECT MIN(sub.ApproveOrder) FROM usr.ITSMApproval sub WHERE sub.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND sub.TableID = @ID AND sub.ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND sub.State != 0 AND sub.IsApproved IS NULL ) AND IsApproved IS NULL AND State != 0
UPDATE usr.ITSMRelease SET ActualApproveRoundGuid = NEWID() WHERE ID = @ID
UPDATE usr.ITSMRelease SET IsFirstApproveGenerated = 1 WHERE ID = @ID

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRelease AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)
SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM @ITSMApprovalRequestFakeSubForm ) ,1 ,0 )

StateDataSource.SQL: IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp WHERE itsApp.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.[State] != 0 AND ApproveRoundStartDateTime IS NULL ) BEGIN IF (( SELECT itsApp.ApproverType FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp INNER JOIN usr.ITSMRelease AS itsReq ON itsApp.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND itsApp.TableID = itsReq.ID AND itsApp.ApproveRoundGUID = itsReq.ActualApproveRoundGuid WHERE itsReq.ID = @ID AND itsApp.[State] != 0 AND itsApp.IsApproved IS NULL AND itsApp.ApproveOrder = ( SELECT MIN(sub.ApproveOrder) FROM usr.ITSMApproval sub WHERE sub.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND sub.TableID = @ID AND sub.ApproveRoundGUID = itsReq.ActualApproveRoundGuid AND sub.State != 0 AND sub.IsApproved IS NULL ) ) = 'Account' ) BEGIN SELECT 40 END ELSE BEGIN SELECT 30 END END ELSE BEGIN SELECT 50 END

IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp INNER JOIN usr.ITSMRelease AS itsReq ON itsApp.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND itsApp.TableID = itsReq.ID AND itsApp.ApproveRoundGUID = itsReq.ActualApproveRoundGuid WHERE itsApp.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.[State] != 0 AND itsApp.IsApproved IS NULL ) BEGIN IF (( SELECT itsApp.ApproverType FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp INNER JOIN usr.ITSMRelease AS itsReq ON itsApp.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND itsApp.TableID = itsReq.ID AND itsApp.ApproveRoundGUID = itsReq.ActualApproveRoundGuid WHERE itsReq.ID = @ID AND itsApp.[State] != 0 AND itsApp.IsApproved IS NULL AND itsApp.ApproveOrder = ( SELECT MIN(sub.ApproveOrder) FROM usr.ITSMApproval sub WHERE sub.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND sub.TableID = @ID AND sub.ApproveRoundGUID = itsReq.ActualApproveRoundGuid AND sub.State != 0 AND sub.IsApproved IS NULL ) ) = 'Account' ) BEGIN SELECT 40 END ELSE BEGIN SELECT 30 END END ELSE BEGIN SELECT 50 END

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMApproval WHERE ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND ApproveRoundStartDateTime IS NULL AND State != 0 ) AND EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRelease WHERE ID = @ID AND State IN (30,40) ) ,1,0 )

DataSource.SQL: SELECT CAST([GUID] AS VARCHAR(MAX)) AS ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting WHERE FunctionalKey = 'itsm' AND [State] != @DeletedState
